channel.title: GitHub AI Ranking Changes (Top 10)
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub AI repository rankings (Top 10 per category)

item.title: [LLM] llama.cpp
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
LLM inference in C/C++
Language: C++
Category: LLM Stars: 99,510 | Forks: 15,865

item.title: [LLM] awesome-llm-apps
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1)
Collection of awesome LLM apps with AI Agents and RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 103,696 | Forks: 15,138

item.title: [LLM] everything-claude-code
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 108,508 → 110,738 (+2,230)
The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
Language: JavaScript
Category: LLM Stars: 110,738 | Forks: 14,447

item.title: [LLM] open-webui
item.description:
📉 Rank: #6 → #7 (↓1)
User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 128,868 | Forks: 18,230

item.title: [LLM] langchain
item.description:
📉 Rank: #5 → #6 (↓1)
The agent engineering platform
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 131,260 | Forks: 21,615

item.title: [LLM] dify
item.description:
📉 Rank: #4 → #5 (↓1)
Production-ready platform for agentic workflow development.
Language: TypeScript
Category: LLM Stars: 134,666 | Forks: 20,956

item.title: [LLM] prompts.chat
item.description:
📉 Rank: #3 → #4 (↓1)
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
Language: HTML
Category: LLM Stars: 154,361 | Forks: 20,280

item.title: [LLM] transformers
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #3 (↓1)
🤗 Transformers: the model-definition framework for state-of-the-art machine learning models in text, vision, audio, and multimodal models, for both inference and training.
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 158,464 | Forks: 32,629

item.title: [LLM] ollama
item.description:
📉 Rank: #1 → #2 (↓1)
Get up and running with Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax, DeepSeek, gpt-oss, Qwen, Gemma and other models.
Language: Go
Category: LLM Stars: 166,264 | Forks: 15,184

item.title: [LLM] AutoGPT
item.description:
🆕 NEW ENTRY - Ranked #1 in LLM
AutoGPT is the vision of accessible AI for everyone, to use and to build on. Our mission is to provide the tools, so that you can focus on what matters.
Language: Python
Category: LLM Stars: 182,864 | Forks: 46,223

item.title: [Claude] awesome-claude-skills
item.description:
📉 Rank: #9 → #10 (↓1)
A curated list of awesome Claude Skills, resources, and tools for customizing Claude AI workflows
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 48,299 | Forks: 4,969

item.title: [Claude] gstack
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 47,949 → 50,543 (+2,594)
Use Garry Tan's exact Claude Code setup: 15 opinionated tools that serve as CEO, Designer, Eng Manager, Release Manager, Doc Engineer, and QA
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 50,543 | Forks: 6,473

item.title: [Claude] ui-ux-pro-max-skill
item.description:
📉 Rank: #7 → #8 (↓1) | ⭐ Stars: 50,980 → 52,059 (+1,079)
An AI SKILL that provide design intelligence for building professional UI/UX multiple platforms
Language: Python
Category: Claude Stars: 52,059 | Forks: 5,009

item.title: [Claude] lobehub
item.description:
📉 Rank: #6 → #7 (↓1)
The ultimate space for work and life — to find, build, and collaborate with agent teammates that grow with you. We are taking agent harness to the next level — enabling multi-agent collaboration, effortless agent team design, and introducing agents as the unit of work interaction.
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 74,370 | Forks: 14,848

item.title: [Claude] claude-code
item.description:
📉 Rank: #5 → #6 (↓1)
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.
Language: Shell
Category: Claude Stars: 83,292 | Forks: 7,011

item.title: [Claude] NextChat
item.description:
📉 Rank: #4 → #5 (↓1)
✨ Light and Fast AI Assistant. Support: Web | iOS | MacOS | Android | Linux | Windows
Language: TypeScript
Category: Claude Stars: 87,596 | Forks: 60,037

item.description:

item.title: [Claude] system-prompts-and-models-of-ai-tools
item.description:
📉 Rank: #2 → #3 (↓1)
FULL Augment Code, Claude Code, Cluely, CodeBuddy, Comet, Cursor, Devin AI, Junie, Kiro, Leap.new, Lovable, Manus, NotionAI, Orchids.app, Perplexity, Poke, Qoder, Replit, Same.dev, Trae, Traycer AI, VSCode Agent, Warp.dev, Windsurf, Xcode, Z.ai Code, Dia & v0. (And other Open Sourced) System Prompts, Internal Tools & AI Models
Category: Claude Stars: 133,388 | Forks: 33,651

item.title: [AI Agents] ragflow
item.description:
📉 Rank: #8 → #9 (↓1)
RAGFlow is a leading open-source Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) engine that fuses cutting-edge RAG with Agent capabilities to create a superior context layer for LLMs
Language: Python
Category: AI Agents Stars: 76,318 | Forks: 8,545
